name: Peanut Butter Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cans FRENCH'S Potato Sticks (1 1/2 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Place butter and peanut butter in a 9 X 13 inch baking dish.
3. Heat in the oven for 4 minutes until melted.
4. Stir in potato sticks, toasted oat cereal, and shredded wheat. Mix well to coat.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, stirring halfway through.
6. Cool mixture to room temperature.
7. Stir in chocolate chips.
